summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Walmart Receipt Generator with focus on recent updates: README.md deployment instructions, receipt formatting improvements (date/time spacing, # ITEMS SOLD styling), and Share Receipt functionality. All features working perfectly with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: README.md exists with comprehensive deployment instructions
Backend health endpoints (/api/, /api/health) - 100% success
UPC lookup API with MongoDB caching (/api/products/lookup/{upc})
Receipt calculation API with accurate tax math (/api/receipts/calculate)
PDF generation API with valid PDF output (/api/receipts/generate-pdf)
Share Receipt API - POST /api/receipts/share creates receipt and returns receipt_id
Get Shared Receipt API - GET /api/receipts/shared/{id} returns correct data
Share Receipt button appears and functions in main view
Receipt preview shows date and time spaced apart (justify-content: space-between)
# ITEMS SOLD line is 16px font, bold (700), and centered with 12px margin
Shared receipt page loads with blue header (#0071DC background)
Shared receipt page has back arrow button with ChevronLeft icon
Shared receipt page has share icon button with Upload icon
Shared receipt page displays receipt content correctly
Shared receipt page has Download PDF button
Add item functionality with live receipt preview updates
Tax calculations are accurate (taxable vs non-taxable items)
Item management (add, remove, void, tax flags)
Back button navigation from shared receipt to main page
Receipt formatting consistency between main and shared views
